name: alab-monorepo
description: AlabJS — full-stack React framework powered by a Rust compiler core

scripts.clean: turbo clean && find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && cargo clean
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter alab build && pnpm --filter alab-vite-plugin build
scripts.dev:basic-ssr: pnpm build:packages && cd examples/basic-ssr && node ../../packages/alab/dist/cli.js dev
scripts.dev:dashboard: pnpm build:packages && cd examples/dashboard-csr && node ../../packages/alab/dist/cli.js dev
